hero.title: We Transform
hero.description: Cutting-edge technology solutions for healthcare professionals. Optimize your practice with modern and efficient tools.

turnosmedicos.title: TurnosMedicos
turnosmedicos.subtitle: The most complete platform for medical appointment management in Argentina. Simple, fast, and secure.
turnosmedicos.feature1Description: Automated appointment system with WhatsApp and email reminders to reduce no-shows.
turnosmedicos.feature2Description: View all your activity in real-time with detailed statistics and custom reports.
turnosmedicos.feature3Description: Manage multiple offices from a single account with role-based access.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Comprehensive solutions to modernize your medical practice
services.service1Description: We create personalized applications that perfectly adapt to your practice's needs.
services.service2Description: We connect your existing systems with new tools for a seamless workflow.
services.service3Description: We advise you on the digital transformation of your practice with the best available technologies.
services.service4Description: Continuous technical assistance so you never lack help when you need it most.
services.service5Description: We train your team to get the most out of all technological tools.
services.service6Description: We protect your patients' information with the highest security standards.

pricing.title: Plans and Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that best fits your practice
pricing.plan1Description: Ideal for starting to digitize your practice

about.title: About Doctore.ar
about.description1: We are a team of professionals passionate about technology and healthcare. Our mission is to simplify medical management through innovative solutions.
about.description2: Since 2020, we have helped thousands of healthcare professionals in Argentina modernize their practices, improve patient experience, and optimize their time.

contact.title: Contact Us
